options.name: -area
options.description: Area in which well-taps are to be verified

options.name: -avoidAbutment
options.description: Check no abutted tap cell in vertical and horizontal direction

options.name: -check
options.description: Check the latchup rule for pwell or nwell only

options.name: -fromEdge
options.description: Checks the rule distance from the right and left edges of the well-tap cells

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specify layer name to check rule check.

options.name: -powerDomain
options.description: Specify the power domain to check

options.name: -rule
options.description: Specify the maximum distance betwen two well-tap cells

options.name: -siteOffset
options.description: > # Check the offset value in number of sites that vertical taps need to be aware of
